summary: Completed testing of Pipeline Verification UI in ReportsSection. Backend verify-batch endpoint works correctly (verified via curl). Frontend UI shows Pipeline Verification block with 'Verify Top 3 Issues' and 'Verify Top 6 Issues' buttons. Generate Report button is correctly disabled during verification. Workflow guidance is displayed in the Generate Report dialog.
critical_code_review_comments: Pipeline Verification block (data-testid='pipeline-verification-block') is correctly rendered in ReportsSection
Verify Top 3 Issues button (data-testid='verify-top-3-btn') calls backend and shows loading state
Verify Top 6 Issues button (data-testid='verify-top-6-btn') is present and functional
Generate Report button (data-testid='generate-report-btn') is correctly disabled during pipeline verification
Workflow guidance (data-testid='report-workflow-guidance') shows recommended workflow for each report type
Backend verify-batch endpoint returns correct response with eligible_issues, attempted, verified, failed, synced_count fields

success_rate.backend: 100% (verified via curl - verify-batch, reports list, report generation all working)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Pipeline Verification UI fully tested. The verify-batch endpoint takes 30-60 seconds to complete as it involves LLM calls. The UI correctly shows loading state during verification and disables the Generate Report button. After verification completes, the 'Unverified grounds' count decreases. The workflow guidance in the Generate Report dialog correctly shows: Quick Summary (generate directly), Full Detailed Report (verify top 3 issues first), Extensive Log (verify top 6 issues first).

pipeline_verification_block.description: Block with title 'Pipeline Verification' and description about verifying classified issues

generate_report_disabled_during_verify.description: Button is disabled when pipelineVerifyLoading is true

workflow_guidance.description: Shows recommended workflow for Quick Summary, Full Detailed Report, and Extensive Log

backend_reports_list.description: Returns list of reports with report_id, report_type, status

ui_screenshots: .screenshots/13_reports_section.png - Reports tab with Pipeline Verification block
.screenshots/17_generate_dialog.png - Generate Report dialog with workflow guidance
